channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17772] sanity-compr test_270h: Invalid layout, unrecognized error: -1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7b32c252-7710-4d4e-a06b-1a7b3509b5a7

test_270h failed with the following error:

Can't create file from OST|DOM mirror layout

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102975 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102975 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

sanity 270h failed when PFL layout is set to root fs, it failed on all 4 different layouts(patch of LU-16904)
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-compr env=ONLY="56a 65a",compr_STRIPEPARAMS="-E 1M -c1 -E eof"
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-compr env=ONLY="56a 65a",compr_STRIPEPARAMS="-E 64k -c 1 -E eof"
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-compr env=ONLY="56a 65a",compr_STRIPEPARAMS="-E 64k -c 1 -E eof -c 2"
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-compr env=ONLY="56a 65a",compr_STRIPEPARAMS="-E 64k -c 1 -E 1M -c 2 -E eof -c 4 -S 4M"

== sanity test 270h: DoM: DoM stripe removal when disabled on server ========================================================== 13:24:40 (1709990680)
CMD: trevis-65vm6 params=\$(/usr/sbin/lctl get_param lod.*.dom_stripesize);
			 [[ -z \"lustre-MDT0000\" ]] && param= ||
			 param=\$(grep lustre-MDT0000 <<< \"\$params\");
			 [[ -z \$param ]] && param=\"\$params\";
			 while read s; do echo mds1 \$s;
			 done <<< \"\$param\"
CMD: trevis-65vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.dom_stripesize=0
Invalid layout, unrecognized error: -1
lfs setstripe: cannot create composite file '/mnt/lustre/d270h.sanity/f270h.sanity': Success
 sanity test_270h: @@@@@@ FAIL: Can't create file from OST|DOM mirror layout 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6975:error()
  = sanity.sh:25062:test_270h()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7315:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7375:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7201:run_test()
  = sanity.sh:25067:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-09/lustre-reviews_custom_102975_1001_70ce8b68-58fa-40c1-8021-f0d0767f7856//sanity.test_270h.*.1709990682.log
CMD: trevis-65vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-65vm2,trevis-65vm3,trevis-65vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-09/lustre-reviews_custom_102975_1001_70ce8b68-58fa-40c1-8021-f0d0767f7856//sanity.test_270h.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1709990682.log;
		dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-09/lustre-reviews_custom_102975_1001_70ce8b68-58fa-40c1-8021-f0d0767f7856//sanity.test_270h.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1709990682.log
CMD: trevis-65vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.dom_stripesize=1048576
FAIL 270h (7s)

I tried to reproduce it locally, but it actually passed with 1,2,4,7 osts locally

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-compr test_270h - Can't create file from OST|DOM mirror layout
item.summary: sanity-compr test_270h: Invalid layout, unrecognized error: -1

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
